title: Humanlike Multi-user Agent (Humalike): Designing a Deceptively Human AI Facilitator for Group Chats
excerpt: Give your Hermes Agent bot social intelligence in one install: turn-taking, persona, theory of mind, social learning.
content_html:
Make your Hermes Agent feel more Humanlike.

hermes update &&
git clone https://github.com/Humalike/hermes-humalike-plugin ~/.hermes/plugins/humalike &&
hermes plugins enable humalike &&
hermes

One shot integrations:

#1  Turn-taking

Knows when to speak

Reads the chat’s rhythm and decides whether to jump in or stay silent. No wall of bot text.

#2  Persona

Has a self

/soul enhance turns a one-line description into a fully-voiced character, so replies sound like someone.

#3  Theory of mind

Reads the room

Weighs how a message will land for the person on the other end, and adjusts before sending.

#4  Social learning

Adapts to group's tone

Picks up the group’s slang, formatting, and formality, and starts sounding like a member.

Feels like a person. Everywhere it talks.

Everywhere it talks.

content_html_zh:
让你的赫尔墨斯特工感觉更人性化。

hermes update &&
git clone https://github.com/Humalike/hermes-humalike-plugin ~/.hermes/plugins/humalike &&
hermes plugins enable humalike &&
hermes

一键集成：

#1 轮流行动

知道什么时候说话

解读聊天的节奏并决定是加入还是保持沉默。 没有机器人文本墙。

#2 人

有一个自己

/soul增强将一行描述变成一个全语音角色，因此回复听起来像某人。

#3 心理理论

读房间

权衡消息如何到达另一端的人，并在发送前进行调整。

#4 社交学习

适应团体的基调

学习该团体的俚语、格式和礼仪，并开始听起来像一名成员。

感觉像一个人。 到处都在说话。
